  • Uses of Game in com.example.battleship.controller.persistence

    Methods in com.example.battleship.controller.persistence that return Game
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Game
    SavedGameRepository.load()
    Reads back the previously saved Game, exactly as it was when SavedGameRepository.save(com.example.battleship.model.Game) was called -- both boards, every ship's hit history, and whose turn it is.
    Methods in com.example.battleship.controller.persistence with parameters of type Game
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    SavedGameRepository.save(Game game)
    Writes both the serialized game and the plain-text summary, overwriting any previous save.
